specs.title: cp-000: Instant gauge size is 110
cp-001: Instant gauge center displays the numeric fleschReadingEase score
cp-002: Instant gauge label comes from clientMetricsreadabilityLabel
cp-003: Instant readability labels in the current implementation are Easy Standard Diffi
cp-004: Counts grid renders Words Sentences and Paragraphs summary cards
cp-005: Readability section renders four MetricBar rows
cp-006: Writing Quality section renders four IssueBadge tiles
cp-007: Instant issues section header shows Issues clientIssueslength
cp-008: Instant issues list renders at most 10 items before collapsing to a N more issue
cp-009: Warning-severity instant issues use yellow styling
cp-010: Non-warning instant issues use blue styling
cp-011: Successful analysis hides the source toggle and displays the three-color legend
cp-012: Results left panel wraps the analyzed text in a glass-panel rounded-2xl p-8 cont
cp-013: Results left panel header contains the Analyze New Text reset button on the left
cp-014: Results left panel header shows activeDocdocumentTitle on the right when a docum
cp-015: Clicking Analyze New Text sets result back to null
cp-016: Clicking Analyze New Text clears paragraphs
cp-017: Clicking Analyze New Text resets activeTab back to issues
cp-018: Results right panel width is w-96
cp-019: Results right panel gauge size is 120
cp-020: Results right panel keeps the Words Sentences and Paragraphs summary cards above
cp-021: Each paragraph is rendered from the precomputed paragraphs array not by splittin
cp-022: Paragraphs with no matching paragraphAnalysis entry default to 100 human probabi
cp-023: Paragraphs under 40 human use red background and left border styling
cp-024: Paragraphs between 40 and 70 human use yellow background and left border styling
cp-025: Paragraphs above 70 human use emerald background and left border styling
cp-026: Paragraph flags render as Flags comma-separated flags below the paragraph when f
cp-027: Paragraph flag text is omitted entirely when no flags are present
cp-028: Results tab list is driven by analysisTabs
cp-029: Issues-tab count badge uses resultwritingQualitysuggestionslength once results e
cp-030: When writingQualitysuggestionslength 0 the issues tab shows No issues detected Y
cp-031: AI suggestion cards use bg-purple-50010
cp-032: AI suggestion cards include a purple Sparkle icon and a Suggestion n label
cp-033: Local write-good issues render in a dedicated Writing Issues write-good section
cp-034: Results write-good issues render at most 15 cards before a N more issues footer
